ksa_text: Knowledge of ML model serving architecture and deployment strategies, including REST API serving, batch inference, streaming inference, edge deployment, A/B testing, canary releases, shadow deployments, and the latency, throughput, cost, and failure mode trade-offs of each.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Edge-domain AI/ML Engineering KSA with insufficient signal strength (composite score 0.408) to justify inclusion for the BI Director. Without stronger framework alignment, this knowledge KSA does not meet the inclusion threshold.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope, seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with exclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Could this edge-domain knowledge KSA be expected in real-world BI Director roles, even if not core to the role definition?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Job market analysis and framework role definitions confirm AI/ML Engineering is not a standard competency expectation for BI Director. Edge-case exclusion is consistent with external evidence.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: external evidence does not support including this edge-domain KSA in the BI Director competency profile. Exclusion maintained.

decision_rationale: Insufficient signal (score 0.408) and edge-domain placement (AI/ML Engineering) do not meet inclusion threshold for the BI Director. All passes support exclusion.
